metadata.falPrompt:
Top-down illustrated city map of 13th century Florence, Italy. 
Hand-painted medieval cartographic style, aged parchment texture, 
ink linework with watercolor washes. Muted Tuscan palette — 
weathered stone, burnt sienna rooftops, dusty gold, shadow blue 
waterways. The Arno River runs through the center. 

Key landmarks visible and labeled with small architectural 
illustrations in period style:
- Mercato Vecchio (market district, central)
- Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (large dome, north of center)
- Ponte Vecchio (covered bridge crossing the Arno)
- Piazza della Signoria (open civic square, south of cathedral)

Dense medieval street grid between landmarks. City walls visible 
at edges. No fantasy elements, no modern structures. Serious, 
solemn, melancholic atmosphere. No legend, no compass rose, 
no circles, no overlaid information or icons. Pure illustrated 
map only. Dante's Florence — beautiful, suspended, faintly decayed., epic fantasy art, magical atmosphere, rich detail, dramatic lighting
metadata.finalPrompt:
Top-down illustrated city map of 13th century Florence, Italy. 
Hand-painted medieval cartographic style, aged parchment texture, 
ink linework with watercolor washes. Muted Tuscan palette — 
weathered stone, burnt sienna rooftops, dusty gold, shadow blue 
waterways. The Arno River runs through the center. 

Key landmarks visible and labeled with small architectural 
illustrations in period style:
- Mercato Vecchio (market district, central)
- Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (large dome, north of center)
- Ponte Vecchio (covered bridge crossing the Arno)
- Piazza della Signoria (open civic square, south of cathedral)

Dense medieval street grid between landmarks. City walls visible 
at edges. No fantasy elements, no modern structures. Serious, 
solemn, melancholic atmosphere. No legend, no compass rose, 
no circles, no overlaid information or icons. Pure illustrated 
map only. Dante's Florence — beautiful, suspended, faintly decayed.
